title: Create: Props And Misc
description: Create: Props And Misc is an addon for the popular Minecraft Create mod, enhancing your building and automation experience with a variety of new props.
body: [![](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/game-versions/create-props-and-misc?logo=modrinth&color=242629&labelColor=00AF5C&logoColor=white)](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-props-and-misc) [![](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/create-props-and-misc?logo=modrinth&label=&style=flat&color=242629&labelColor=00AF5C&logoColor=white)](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-props-and-misc) [![CF](https://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/1055859.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-props-and-misc) # Create: Props And Misc (PNM) ### Description Create: Props And Misc expands the versatile Create mod, introducing a variety of decorative items that enhance the visual appeal of your Minecraft world. Additionally, it incorporates features from Extendium, offering even more options for creativity. This addon includes: - **Fillable Jars::** Fill up jars with liquids and foods such as cookies. - **Create Implementation:** A seamless connection with Create. Allows for other Create addons such as Create: Steam 'n' Rails. - **BTW My Brain Is Broken:** So RN I just made the mod and just spent like an hour and a half on making the first block/item: THE COOKIE JAR. please help me my mental health is degrading FAST! - **And Much More!** ### Purpose The purpose of this addon is to enhance the Create mod experience by offering a rich array of props, allowing players to further customize and automate their Minecraft world with creative and practical additions. ### Why Should You Use This? - **Enhanced Creativity:** Expand your building options with a variety of decorative props and themed items. - **Functional Additions:** Utilize new gadgets and blocks to streamline and innovate your automation setups. - **Thematic Flexibility:** Perfect for builders and engineers alike, this addon provides tools and decorations to match any theme or project. - **Immersive Experience:** Create more detailed and immersive environments with carefully designed decorative items. Elevate your Minecraft gameplay with Create: Props And Misc, and bring a new level of detail and functionality to your world!
